global_ui.requirement: Use sidebar filters for agency, office, capability keyword, date range, and score threshold.
Use Plotly for charts and Streamlit dataframes for tables.
Every table should have CSV export.

page.name: Executive Overview
page.metrics: Total spending, award count, opportunity count, average opportunity score, recompetes within 12 months.
page.charts: Spending by agency; spending trend by quarter; top primes; upcoming recompetes.

page.name: Agency Spending Explorer
page.display: Agency, sub-agency, office, spending trends, award counts, top vendors, NAICS/PSC mix.
page.filters: Agency, office, date range, NAICS, PSC, keyword.

page.name: Prime Contractor Intelligence
page.display: Top primes, awards won, award value, agencies supported, vehicles used, recent activity.
page.logic: Rank by total award value, count of awards, target agency alignment, and expiring contracts.

page.name: Recompete Tracker
page.display: Contract name, prime, agency, vehicle, value, start date, end date, months remaining, recompete probability.
page.logic: Flag contracts ending in 0-6, 7-12, and 13-24 months.

page.name: Partner Radar
page.display: Prime contractor, agency relationships, capability alignment, award count, expiring contracts, teaming attractiveness score.
page.logic: Prioritize primes with repeated wins, target agency presence, and relevant expiring awards.

page.name: Opportunity Tracker
page.display: SAM opportunities, notice type, due date, agency, keywords, opportunity score, URL.
page.logic: Prioritize by agency relevance, keyword match, timing, likely fit, and teaming potential.

page.name: Capture Log
page.display: Manual notes by award, opportunity, or vendor.
page.fields: Status, next action, notes, date, relationship owner.
page.recommendation: Include this in the MVP because partner intelligence depends on human context not present in public datasets.
